description.value: Price 12,500 gp; Slot chest CL 5th Weight 2 lbs.; Aura faint transmutation DESCRIPTION Carefully embroidered black leather makes up this stylish bandolier, which can hold as many as 12 daggers, vials, or similarly shaped items. EFFECTS The wearer of a pickpocketâs bandolier opposes Sleight of Hand checks attempt against her with her own Sleight of Hand checks (instead of Perception ). Additionally, as a swift action after succeeding at a Sleight of Hand check, the wearer can stuff stolen goods (of size Tiny or smaller) into one of the slots on the pickpocketâs bandolier, making the purloined object appear to be a simple dagger. Only a careful examination of the bandolier reveals the true nature of items concealed in this manner. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 6,250 gp; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells shrink item
